label: Outcome Classes
description: High-level outcome taxonomy for linking evidence to expected effects and monitoring targets.
usageNotes: Use the high-level class here and map detailed phenotype or measure downstream.
Outcome classes are reusable across SER and EO expected outcome links.

entries.label: Mortality
entries.description: All-cause or cause-specific death.
usageNotes: Preferred primary hard endpoint class when applicable.

entries.label: MACE
entries.description: Major adverse cardiovascular events composite outcome.
usageNotes: Keep as a composite class; component decomposition belongs in detailed metadata.

entries.label: Stroke
entries.description: Cerebrovascular ischemic or hemorrhagic event.
usageNotes: Use as standalone class even when nested within composites.

entries.label: Myocardial Infarction
entries.description: Myocardial infarction event.
usageNotes: Use when MI is explicit as component or outcome.

entries.label: Bleeding
entries.description: Clinically relevant bleeding outcome.
usageNotes: Severity grading belongs in detailed outcome metadata.

entries.label: Infection
entries.description: Postoperative or clinical infection outcome.
usageNotes: Includes SSI, pneumonia and bloodstream infection at high level.

entries.label: AKI
entries.description: Acute kidney injury outcome.
usageNotes: Use when renal failure risk is an operative or ICU concern.

entries.label: Ventilator Time
entries.description: Duration of invasive or assisted ventilation.
usageNotes: Duration measure; unit and threshold belong downstream.

entries.label: ICU LOS
entries.description: Length of stay in intensive care.
usageNotes: Use for critical care utilization impact.

entries.label: Hospital LOS
entries.description: Length of stay during index hospitalization.
usageNotes: Prefer over generic LOS when the unit is the hospital stay.

entries.label: Readmission
entries.description: Hospital readmission after index discharge.
usageNotes: Often paired with time horizon such as 30 days.

entries.label: Reintervention
entries.description: Requirement for repeat procedure or unplanned intervention.
usageNotes: Useful for surgical durability and rescue burden.

entries.label: Quality of Life
entries.description: Patient-reported quality of life outcome.
usageNotes: Instrument detail belongs in measure metadata.

entries.label: Functional Status
entries.description: Ability to perform daily activities or functional recovery.
usageNotes: Use for rehab and long-term recovery outcomes.

entries.label: Symptom Burden
entries.description: Intensity or persistence of symptoms such as pain or dyspnea.
usageNotes: Use when symptoms are direct patient-centered endpoints.

entries.label: Cost
entries.description: Direct or attributable cost outcome.
usageNotes: Do not use to override clinical endpoints; combine with operational relevance instead.

entries.label: Resource Utilization
entries.description: Use of beds, OR time, staffing, devices or other operational resources.
usageNotes: Broader than direct cost.

entries.label: Adherence
entries.description: Adherence to guideline, bundle or recommended process.
usageNotes: Process outcome, not patient outcome.

entries.label: Diagnostic Yield
entries.description: Rate of clinically meaningful diagnostic findings.
usageNotes: Use for screening and diagnosis evidence.

entries.label: Adverse Event
entries.description: Generic adverse event outcome when a more specific class is not available.
usageNotes: Prefer more specific classes where possible.
